rulings.Case Title: ALMA JEAN CALDWELL VS. JUL NIEMIER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiff Alma Jean Caldwell Joins In Plaintiff Hership'S Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings In The Ninth Cause Of Action For Unjust Enrichment
rulings.Rulings: PLAINTIFF ALMA JEAN CALDWELL Plaintiff Alma Jean Caldwell Joins In Plaintiff Hership'S Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings In The Ninth Cause Of Action For Unjust Enrichment. DENY- MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADING.DEFENDANT SUFFICIENTLY RESPONDED IN ITS ANSWER TO THE CLAIM (AFTER CLARYING RE STIPULATION THERE WAS A TYPO).ASSERTING A CLAIM FOR UNJUST ENRICHMENT IS BASED IN EQUITY CAUSE OF ACTION CANNOT BE DETERMINED THRU MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADING (KOSSIAN V. AMER. NATL. INSUR 254 CA 647) (302/REQ/RS)

rulings.Case Title: ALMA JEAN CALDWELL VS. JUL NIEMIER et al

rulings.Rulings: PLAINTIFF HOWARD HERSHIPS, MOTION For Judgment On The Pleadings Pursuant To 438 (A) Ccp Of Plaintiff'S Ninth Cause Of Action, Unjust Enrichment; Request For Judicial Notice DENY- MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADING.DEFENDANT SUFFICIENTLY RESPONDED IN ITS ANSWER TO THE CLAIM (AFTER CLARYING RE STIPULATION THERE WAS A TYPO).ASSERTING A CLAIM FOR UNJUST ENRICHMENT IS BASED IN EQUITY CAUSE OF ACTION CANNOT BE DETERMINED THRU MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADING (KOSSIAN V. AMER. NATL. INSUR 254 CA 647) (302/REQ/RS)

rulings.Case Title: REGENT BUSINESS CENTER SAN FRANCISCO ,LLC VS. WCIII/225 BUSH,LLC et al
rulings.Rulings: DEFENDANT WXIII/225 BUSH,LLC MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT DENY- MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT.GRANT & DENY- MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. 1. DENY MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION CAUSES OF ACTION 1 TO 4 TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT WHETHER WXIII BREACH LEASE BY CHARGING UNREASONABLE OPERATING EXPENSES. 2. GRANT- MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION AS TO 5TH CAUSE OF ACTION & CLAIM FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES AGAINST WXIII.APPLIED EQUIPTMENT CORP. V. LITTON SAUDI ARABIA 7 CAL 4 503 & FREEMAN MILLA V. LECKER 11 CAL 85 3.DENY- MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION AS TO PUNITIVE DAMAGES AGAINTS FLYNN FAILED TO SHIFT THE BURDEN.(302/REQ/PB)

rulings.Case Title: STRATEGIC OUT SOURCE VS. EXECUTIVE DIRECTION, INC.
rulings.Calendar Matter: To Determine Attorneys Fees To Be Awarded To Deft Pursuant To Successful Preliminary Injunction; Exhibits A-F
rulings.Rulings: CROSS COMPLAINANT EXECUTIVE DIRECTION, INC. To Determine Attorneys Fees To Be Awarded. DENY- 1. PROCEDURALLY THE NOTICE FAILS TO STATE THE BASIS OF THE MOTION.2. SUBSTANTIALLY THE POINTS AND AUTHORITIES PROVIDE NO CASE LAW SUPPORTING THE MOTION. 3. THE OPPISITION ALSO SETS FORTH GROUNDS FOR DENIAL. (302/REQ/KS)
